title: Charter CEO has appetite for more cable M&A
summary: 'We'd like to acquire more cable assets if it can be done at an appropriate price [and] conditions,' said Charter CEO Chris Winfrey. Meanwhile, Charter shares are slumping amid disappointing Q1 results.

title: Midco reveals mobile pricing and packaging
summary: In the wake of market trials, Midco has introduced unlimited and by-the-Gig mobile plans in all markets. Midco Mobile, which rides the AT&T network, was developed with MVNE partner Telgoo5.

title: The Buildout: Wire 3 grows its Georgia footprint
summary: This week in broadband builds: Wire 3 invests another $37 million in Georgia; Mediacom wraps Minnesota builds; GoNetspeed grows footprint in Connecticut; Comcast connects more Missourians – and more.

title: FCC touts D2D actions
summary: The FCC said it has progressed the nascent D2D market this week by granting licenses to AST SpaceMobile and by reaffirming exclusive rights for certain D2D spectrum bands. #pressrelease

title: WBD shareholders OK Paramount Skydance deal
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) said stockholders voted to approve its pending combo with Paramount Skydance, putting it on a path for a Q3 2026 close. #pressrelease

title: Verizon Frontline carves out a slice for laptops, tablets and smartphones
summary: Verizon Frontline said it has rolled out a dedicated 5G network slice for compatible laptops, tablets and smartphones used by first responders. #pressrelease

title: ACI integrates amps with Harmonic's virtualized access platform
summary: ACI Communications said it has integrated its new 'Infinity' amplifiers with cOS, Harmonic's virtualized access platform for HFC and FTTP networks. #pressreleaase

title: Omdia raises 2026 semiconductor forecast to 62.7% as AI drives global memory crunch
summary: Computing and data storage will lead all segments in semiconductor revenue growth, rising 90% year-on-year in 2026 to exceed $700bn. #pressrelease

title: Comcast shares climb amid narrowing broadband losses, record mobile gains
summary: Comcast shed a better-than-expected 65,000 broadband subs alongside a record gain of 435,000 mobile lines in Q1 thanks in part to its pivot to new pricing and packaging. A challenge ahead? Converting free mobile lines to paid.

title: Equinix's AI Discovery Hub set to accelerate AI deployment in Hong Kong
summary: Equinix has partnered with HPE to create an Nvidia-powered AI testing environment that will help companies in Hong Kong speed up their AI deployments.

title: Cisco researchers take quantum leap for networks
summary: Cisco unveils a prototype universal switch that it says is the big missing piece for quantum networks.

title: How the SpaceX-EchoStar relationship extends beyond spectrum and D2D
summary: Alongside EchoStar's sales of spectrum to SpaceX, EchoStar is now testing Starlink sales in 400-plus Boost Mobile stores, and Dish-owned OnTech Smart Services is offering professional installs of Starlink.

title: Eurobites: BT sets out its 'sovereign' stall
summary: Also in today's EMEA regional roundup: how the UK planning system is derailing AI; Middle East, Africa drives Q1 growth for Orange; MTN deploys Huawei's massive MIMO in Nigeria.

title: Nokia enjoys optical boom but mobile is still feeling the heat
summary: Shares at Nokia rose to a 16-year high as it lifted guidance on AI demand, but its long-suffering mobile business desperately needs a revival.

title: Verizon CEO emerges as telecom's AI doomster-in-chief
summary: Dan Schulman of Verizon would not be the first company boss to blame job cuts on AI when the real story is far less exciting.

title: China telco earnings slump on tax hike, weak growth
summary: Q1 earnings dived at all three China telcos.

title: AT&T might look beyond AST SpaceMobile for D2D
summary: AT&T has hooked up with AST SpaceMobile for direct-to-device capabilities, but CEO John Stankey said it's entirely possible that AT&T will work with multiple satellite partners for D2D.

title: Render Networks raises funds, acquires mPower
summary: Render Networks announced $20 million AUD in private equity growth funding alongside the acquisition of mPower Innovations. #pressrelease

title: Walmart is the US wireless industry's most important store
summary: Walmart Supercenter accounted for 17.4 percent of wireless store visits in Q2 2025.

title: Comcast's new mobile plans could boost ARPU
summary: Comcast has launched two new unlimited plans – Mobile Plus and Mobile Select – that aim to put more focus on premium features and simplicity. Their flat rate per line structure could improve ARPU compared to Comcast's legacy mobile plans.
